_comment: Tier-2: Kratos CONSTITUTIVE_LAW Properties binding requires an *instance*, not a class. Passing the class object directly (e.g. SMA.LinearElasticPlaneStrain2DLaw — without the trailing parens) raises pybind11 TypeError 'incompatible function arguments'. This is from the same pitfall family I documented retroactively from PR #24 (Kratos LE stub-replacement work).
